full_text:
Wen Bu
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wen Bu. Local clan leader, he was defeated by Xie Jing and fled to Shu but Lu Xun persuaded him to come back. Wen Bu was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wu Kingdom.
